segments.text: Wisdom will praise her own soul, and will proclaim her glory in the midst of her people.
She will open her mouth in the congregation of the Most High, and proclaim her glory in the presence of his power.
I came out of the mouth of the Most High, and covered the earth as a mist.
segments.speaker: Wisdom

segments.text: I lived in high places, and my throne is in the pillar of the cloud.
segments.speaker: Wisdom

segments.text: Alone I surrounded the circuit of heaven, and walked in the depth of the abyss.
segments.speaker: Wisdom

segments.text: In the waves of the sea, and in all the earth, and in every people and nation, I obtained a possession.
segments.speaker: Wisdom

segments.text: With all these I sought rest. In whose inheritance shall I lodge?
segments.speaker: Wisdom

segments.text:
Then the Creator of all things gave me a command. He who created me made my tent to rest, 
and said, ‘Let your dwelling be in Jacob, 
and your inheritance in Israel.’
segments.speaker: Wisdom

segments.text: He created me from the beginning, before the ages. For all ages, I will not cease to exist.
segments.speaker: Wisdom

segments.text: In the holy tabernacle, I ministered before him. So I was established in Zion.
segments.speaker: Wisdom

segments.text: In the beloved city, likewise he gave me rest. In Jerusalem was my domain.
segments.speaker: Wisdom

segments.text: I took root in a people that was honored, even in the portion of the Lord’s own inheritance.
segments.speaker: Wisdom

segments.text: I was exalted like a cedar in Lebanon, And like a cypress tree on the mountains of Hermon.
segments.speaker: Wisdom

segments.text:
I was exalted like a palm tree on the sea shore, like rose bushes in Jericho, 
and like a fair olive tree in the plain. 
I was exalted like a plane tree.
segments.speaker: Wisdom

segments.text:
Like cinnamon and aspalathus, I have given a scent to perfumes. Like choice myrrh, I spread abroad a pleasant fragrance, 
like galbanum, onycha, stacte, 
and as the smell of frankincense in the tabernacle.
segments.speaker: Wisdom

segments.text: Like the terebinth, I stretched out my branches. My branches are glorious and graceful.
segments.speaker: Wisdom

segments.text: Like the vine, I put forth grace. My flowers are the fruit of glory and riches.
segments.speaker: Wisdom

segments.text: “Come to me, all you who desire me, and be filled with my fruits.
segments.speaker: Wisdom

segments.text: For my memory is sweeter than honey, and my inheritance than the honeycomb.
segments.speaker: Wisdom

segments.text: Those who eat me will be hungry for more. Those who drink me will be thirsty for more.
segments.speaker: Wisdom

segments.text: He who obeys me will not be ashamed. Those who work with me will not sin.
segments.speaker: Wisdom

segments.text: All these things are the book of the covenant of the Most High God, the law which Moses commanded us for an inheritance for the assemblies of Jacob.
It is he who makes wisdom abundant, as Pishon, and as Tigris in the days of first fruits.
He makes understanding full as the Euphrates, and as the Jordan in the days of harvest,
who makes instruction shine forth as the light, as Gihon in the days of vintage.
The first man didn’t know her perfectly. In like manner, the last has not explored her.
For her thoughts are filled from the sea, and her counsels from the great deep.
I came out as a canal stream from a river, and as an irrigation ditch into a garden.
I said,
I will water my garden, and will drench my garden bed.
segments.speaker: Unknown

segments.text: Behold, my stream became a river, and my river became a sea.
I will yet bring instruction to light as the morning, and will make these things clear from far away.
I will continue to pour out teaching like prophecy, and leave it to all generations.
See that I have not labored for myself only, but for all those who diligently seek wisdom.
